config.title: O11Y Survivors
config.content:
## O11Y Survivors (this repo)

A **lighthearted, public-friendly** Phaser browser game — observability jokes, parody bosses, **no** in-game telemetry to Elasticsearch unless you add it.

### Play (GitHub Pages)

After [Actions](https://github.com/poulsbopete/Vampire-Clone/actions) deploys **`main`**:

**[Play on GitHub Pages →](https://poulsbopete.github.io/Vampire-Clone/)**

### Run locally

```bash
npm install && npm run development
```

### Elastic dashboards

Wire Lens / ES|QL to your data when ingest exists.

---
*Kibana dashboards API (`kibana-dashboards.js`).*
